Patch Set 8:

(17 comments)

To avoid further deep changes in central common templates with the risk of breaking other charts I have refactored the entire chart in patchset8.

Now different functionalities/pod types are moved to sub-charts: master, data, ingest, metrics, curator
This approach fits now better to include "common.*".approach mentioned in many review commentars. (Hopefully) I still cover all the comments in the new structure.

enhancements in 'common.*' templates addresses
- customizing of additional label/matchLabel aka 'role'-label
- customizing of suffixes
and should not break other charts.

define "common.matchLabels" was enhanced prevent on demand label app.kubernetes.io/name. 'elastic-discovery'-service selects endpoints in different pods of sub-charts as well. 'name'-label prevents endpint in sub-charts
As an alternative 'discovery' service can be defined without 'common.service' template. Feel free to comment.

Unfortunatly in patchset8 two unrequired code changes were commited 
templates/_storage.tpl -> revert back to original/master (unchanged)
templates/_label.tpl:
define "common.templateMetadata" --> podAnnotation changes"

I'll  remove this during the next review cycle with the next patch set
